title: Triple hormone receptor agonist retatrutide for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease: a randomized phase 2a trial
population: participants with obesity and metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease in a phase 2 substudy
key_results: Substantial reductions in liver fat were observed in higher-dose retatrutide groups.
safety_findings: Safety interpretation remained consistent with the parent phase 2 programme.
limitations: Substudy sample and imaging endpoints do not establish clinical liver-outcome benefit.

provenance.verification_method: PMID, DOI and parent NCT cross-check

investigational_status_notice: Retatrutide remains investigational and is not approved for public use.
